branch.question: Does the document have ≥2 header levels?

branch.conclusion: Use MarkdownChunker with header_path propagation. Apply r2-min-size-guard, r4-oversize-subdivide.
Skip this methodology. Use chunking-basics recursive splitter — single-level headers offer no hierarchy to propagate.
Use HTMLChunker with BeautifulSoup. Apply r1, r2, r4.
Pre-extract text with BeautifulSoup, then delegate to chunking-basics recursive splitter; HTMLChunker would emit one giant chunk.
Skip this methodology. Route to chunking-basics, chunking-code-ast, or chunking-semantic per content type.

example.p: docs/auth.md with 3 header levels → MarkdownChunker → header_path "Authentication > Tokens" propagated to all sub-chunks.
